name: IndusInd Celesta Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5X Reward Points on all international transactions
3X Reward Points on travel and dining spends
1 Reward Point per ₹100 spent on all other purchases

welcomeBenefits.description: 3,000 bonus Reward Points on card activation

milestoneBenefits.benefit: 5,000 bonus Reward Points + lounge access renewal

additionalBenefits: 8 domestic + 4 international lounge visits per year
Fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹300 per month
pros: Good lounge access with 8 domestic + 4 international visits
Lower foreign currency markup of 2.5% compared to mid-tier cards
3X rewards on travel and dining is competitive
Annual fee waiver at ₹3L spend is reasonable
cons: Base earn rate of 1 RP/₹100 is average
Point value of ₹0.50 is not the best in this segment
Welcome benefit of 3,000 RP is modest for a ₹3,000 fee
Limited to 4 international lounge visits per year
idealFor: Frequent international travellers who can leverage 5X international rewards
Users seeking a balanced travel card with decent lounge access
Moderate to high spenders in the ₹3-5L annual spend range

faqs.question: How many lounge visits does the Celesta card offer?
faqs.answer: The IndusInd Celesta card offers 8 complimentary domestic lounge visits and 4 international lounge visits per year via Priority Pass.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹3,000 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: How do international spending rewards work?
faqs.answer: All international transactions earn 5X Reward Points (5 RP per ₹100 equivalent). Note that a 2.5% foreign currency markup is also applicable on international transactions.

faqs.question: Can I convert reward points to airline miles?
faqs.answer: Yes, Celesta Reward Points can be converted to airline miles with partner airlines. Check the IndusInd rewards portal for available airlines and conversion ratios.
